entry.title: Homes (Fitness for Human Habitation) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to amend the Landlord and Tenant Act 1985 to require that residential rented accommodation is provided and maintained in a state of fitness for human habitation; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Courts and Tribunals (Judiciary and Functions of Staff) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about the judiciary and the functions of the staff of courts and tribunals.

entry.title: Prisons (Interference with Wireless Telegraphy) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about interference with wireless telegraphy in prisons and similar institutions.

entry.title: Health and Social Care (National Data Guardian) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to establish, and make provision about, the National Data Guardian for Health and Social Care; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Ivory Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to prohibit dealing in ivory, and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Civil Liability Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about whiplash claims and the personal injury discount rate.

entry.title: Northern Ireland (Executive Formation and Exercise of Functions) Act 2018 (repealed)
entry.summary: An Act to facilitate the formation of an Executive in Northern Ireland by extending the time for making Ministerial appointments following the election of the Northern Ireland Assembly on 2 March 2017; and to make provision about the exercise of governmental functions in, or in relation to, Northern Ireland in the absence of Northern Ireland Ministers.

entry.title: Mental Health Units (Use of Force) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about the oversight and management of the appropriate use of force in relation to people in mental health units; to make provision about the use of body cameras by police officers in the course of duties in relation to people in mental health units; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Non-Domestic Rating (Nursery Grounds) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision for buildings used as nursery grounds to be exempt from non-domestic rates in England and Wales.

entry.title: Rating (Property in Common Occupation) and Council Tax (Empty Dwellings) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision, where two or more hereditaments occupied or owned by the same person meet certain conditions as to contiguity, for those hereditaments to be treated for the purposes of non-domestic rating as one hereditament; and to increase the percentage by which a billing authority in England may increase the council tax payable in respect of a long-term empty dwelling.

entry.title: Parental Bereavement (Leave and Pay) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about leave and pay for employees whose children have died.

entry.title: Assaults on Emergency Workers (Offences) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about offences when perpetrated against emergency workers, and persons assisting such workers; to make certain offences aggravated when perpetrated against such workers in the exercise of their duty; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Taxation (Cross-border Trade) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to impose and regulate a duty of customs by reference to the importation of goods into the United Kingdom; to confer a power to impose and regulate a duty of customs by reference to the export of goods from the United Kingdom; to make other provision in relation to any duty of customs in connection with the withdrawal of the United Kingdom from the EU; to amend the law relating to value added tax, and the law relating to any excise duty on goods, in connection with that withdrawal; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Domestic Gas and Electricity (Tariff Cap) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision for the imposition of a cap on rates charged to domestic customers for the supply of gas and electricity; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Northern Ireland Budget Act 2018 (repealed)
entry.summary: An Act to authorise the issue out of the Consolidated Fund of Northern Ireland of certain sums for the service of the year ending 31 March 2019; to appropriate those sums for specified purposes; to authorise the Department of Finance in Northern Ireland to borrow on the credit of the appropriated sums; to authorise the use for the public service of certain resources (including accruing resources) for the year ending 31 March 2019; and to repeal certain spent provisions.

entry.title: Haulage Permits and Trailer Registration Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about the international transport of goods by road; to make provision about the registration of trailers; and for connected purposes.

entry.title: Automated and Electric Vehicles Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about automated vehicles and electric vehicles.

entry.title: Supply and Appropriation (Main Estimates) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to authorise the use of resources for the year ending with 31 March 2019; to authorise both the issue of sums out of the Consolidated Fund and the application of income for that year; and to appropriate the supply authorised for that year by this Act and by the Supply and Appropriation (Anticipation and Adjustments) Act 2018.

entry.title: European Union (Withdrawal) Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to repeal the European Communities Act 1972 and make other provision in connection with the withdrawal of the United Kingdom from the EU.

entry.title: Nuclear Safeguards Act 2018
entry.summary: An Act to make provision about nuclear safeguards; and for connected purposes.
